name: Text transforms
description: Everyday clipboard text transforms: trim, UPPERCASE, lowercase, strip formatting, and fix keyboard layout.

providers.name: Trim whitespace
providers.description: Removes leading and trailing whitespace and newlines from the clipboard text.
providers.longHelp: Strips whitespace and newline characters from both ends of the text, leaving the interior untouched. Useful for cleaning up values copied with stray leading or trailing spaces.

providers.name: UPPERCASE
providers.description: Converts the clipboard text to uppercase.
providers.longHelp: Maps every letter to its uppercase form using the system locale rules. Non-letter characters are left unchanged.

providers.name: lowercase
providers.description: Converts the clipboard text to lowercase.
providers.longHelp: Maps every letter to its lowercase form using the system locale rules. Non-letter characters are left unchanged.

providers.name: Strip formatting
providers.description: Strips rich text formatting from the clipboard, leaving only the plain text.
providers.longHelp: Replaces the clipboard contents with their plain-text representation, discarding fonts, colors, and other rich-text styling so the text pastes cleanly into any field.

providers.name: Fix keyboard layout (EN ⇄ HE)
providers.description: Corrects text typed in the wrong layout by re-mapping between US-QWERTY and Israeli SI-1452. Direction auto-detected.
providers.longHelp: Re-maps text typed with the wrong active layout between US-QWERTY (English) and Israeli SI-1452 (Hebrew). The direction is detected automatically from the characters present, so the same action fixes both EN→HE and HE→EN mistakes.
